
| \            | $x_{1}x_{0}$ |         |         |         |
| ------------ | ------------ | ------- | ------- | ------- |
| $x_{3}x_{2}$ | 00           | 01      | 11      | 10      |
| 00           | 1            |         |         |         |
| 01           |              |         | 1       |         |
| 11           | 1            | 1       | 1       |         |
| 10           | 1            |         |         |         |
|              | $D_{0}$      | $D_{1}$ | $D_{3}$ | $D_{2}$ |
$D_{2}=0$

$D_{3}\sum(1,3)x_{3}x_{2}$
$D_{3}=x_{2}$

$D_{1}=\sum(3)x_{3}x_{2}$

$D_{0}=\sum(0,2,3)x_{3}x_{2}$
$\overline{ \overline{ D_{0} } }=\overline{ \sum(1) }x_{3}x_{2}$
